title: Forever 21 India South Asia Partners is Hiring: Floor Manager (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Forever 21 India South Asia Partners is Hiring: Floor Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Forever 21 India South Asia Partners invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Floor Manager at our Navi Mumbai location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Forever 21 India South Asia Partners:
Forever 21 India South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Inventory Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Professional development and training programs
• Learning & development budget
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Forever 21 India South Asia Partners!
